docs.title: Letter 8016
docs.author: Gregory the Great (Wisigothic)
docs.subject_summary:
PL77 Book 8, Ep 16: AD MARINIANUM RAVENNE EPISCOPUM.
Redeuntem Roma Claudium abbatem impense com-
mendat.
docs.excerpt: Claudius has been exactly who he appeared to be. Receive him back with the appreciation he deserves. And give him my warmest regards. Gregory

docs.title: Letter 1032
docs.author: Quintus Aurelius Symmachus
docs.subject_summary:
Facis pro mutua diligentia et antiquitate amicitiae nostrae, quod honorem tuum 
vires meas esse confirmas. convenit dictum cum fide morum tuorum, nec umquam te 
dissimilem scriptis talibus dies arguit
docs.excerpt: … from me, my brother Claudius, who is devoted to you and well-informed about my affairs, will see to it.
